title: AURORA, 60384, Bonnie Get Well soon Bear, 9In, Soft Toy, Brown
features: From Aurora's highly popular Teddy Bear Collection
Soft and extremely touchable soft toy made with high quality materials
Bonnie Bear is a gorgeous super soft Teddy Bear with a cuddly body
Children will love this soft and huggable Teddy Bear
description: From the manufacturer Bonnie Get Well Soon teddy bear Our 9" Bonnie Get Well Soon bear is a beautiful, traditional bear especially made for cuddles. He comes wearing a bandage on his arm and head. The perfect gift for all ages and someone who needs some TLC and comfort. She makes a great Get Well Soon gift for someone who is poorly. Suitable from birth About us Established in 1981, Aurora World offers an extensive range of branded products for children and adults. The company sells its product lines via a wide variety of retailers including major zoos, department stores, high-end toy stores and top gift chains, as well as hospital gift shops, fine florists, candy stores and gift/stationary stores worldwide. Aurora is known in the industry for its incredibly high quality products, range of diverse offerings.
